scripts.deploy:staging: firebase use staging && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:production: firebase use production && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:all: firebase use staging && firebase deploy --only functions && firebase use production && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:rules:staging: firebase use staging && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,storage
scripts.deploy:rules:production: firebase use production && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,storage
scripts.deploy:indexes:staging: firebase use staging && firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes
scripts.deploy:indexes:production: firebase use production && firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes
scripts.deploy:indexes:all: firebase use staging && firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes && firebase use production && firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes
